direction: pass cached side-normal geometry into KLAS6 boundary helper on the row-offset parent
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel already loads sides.COSF[idx] and sides.SINF[idx] into COSJ and SINJ for every side, but the KLAS6 boundary helper reloads the same immutable side-normal geometry while projecting neighbor velocity. Passing the cached values through BOUNDA removes redundant global geometry reads on KLAS6 boundary sides while preserving the projection expressions and operand order.
